report:
## Your Health Assessment

Thank you for completing our assessment. Your answers reveal some interesting connections that help explain why your energy isn't where you want it to be.

### Gut Imbalance Affecting Whole-Body Energy

Your white tongue coating and diarrhea together point to a likely imbalance in your gut microbiome. When gut bacteria become overgrown or out of balance, they can produce compounds that interfere with how efficiently your body generates energy—which directly connects to your goal of better energy and that moderate 5/10 you're experiencing.

### Nighttime Stress Response

Waking to urinate during the night often signals that stress hormones are activating when they should be quiet. This can fragment your sleep in ways that leave you feeling less restored by morning, even if you're getting enough hours—another factor that chips away at your daytime energy reserves.

### Afternoon Energy Crash Pattern

That post-lunch crash you experience suggests your body may be relying heavily on stress hormones to maintain energy, which naturally dip after eating. Combined with the gut imbalance we see in your other answers, undigested food may be feeding bacteria that produce compounds which actively suppress your cellular energy production right when you need it most.

---

These patterns often interconnect in ways that a comprehensive consultation can fully uncover. We'd love to explore your unique situation in more depth.

[Book a consultation](https://prism.miami/booking) to start your journey toward better health.
